saveFailed.title: Couldn't save your progress
saveFailed.body: Check your connection and tap Retry. Nothing you typed is lost.

common.saveLater: Continue offline. We'll save when you're back online.

welcome.subtitle: Your coaching journey starts now. Let's set you up in under 60 seconds.

coachPairing.title: Have a coach?
coachPairing.subtitle: Enter the invite code your coach sent you to pair instantly.
coachPairing.skip: I don't have a code yet
coachPairing.deepLinkBanner: Pairing with the invite from your link…

errors.notRecognized: Invite code not recognized. Double-check with your coach.
errors.expired: This invite code has expired. Ask your coach to send a fresh one.
errors.maxUses: This invite code has already been used to the maximum number of times.
errors.network: Couldn't reach our servers. Check your connection and try again.

goals.title: What are you here to grow?
goals.subtitle: Pick everything that fits. You can adjust this any time.

custom.label: Something else
custom.sub: Tell your coach in your own words.

notifications.title: Stay close to your coach
notifications.subtitle: We'll only ping you for coach messages and your daily check-in. Never spam.
bullets: Coach replies the moment they arrive
notifications.deniedNotice: No problem. You can turn these on later from Settings.

checkInTime.title: Pick your daily check-in
checkInTime.subtitle: We'll remind you once a day at this time. Mornings work best for most.

ready.title: Welcome to TGP, {firstName}.
ready.subtitle: Your coach has been notified you've joined. The work starts now.
